summary: Iteration 77: CSP Enforcement + Product Decision Panel features verified. Both backend and frontend implementations are working correctly.

issues: Mixed content warning (HTTP notification requests blocked on HTTPS) - pre-existing issue, not related to current changes

passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/health returns CSP header as 'Content-Security-Policy' (not report-only) - CSP enforced
BACKEND: CSP header contains required directives (default-src, script-src, frame-ancestors)
BACKEND: GET /api/dashboard/next-steps requires authentication (401 without auth)
BACKEND: GET /api/dashboard/next-steps returns steps array with id, priority, title, description, action, icon
BACKEND: GET /api/dashboard/next-steps returns stats object with saved_products, stores, watchlist, insights_used_today
BACKEND: Steps are sorted by priority (ascending)
BACKEND: Maximum 5 steps returned
BACKEND: GET /api/dashboard/daily-winners works (regression test)
BACKEND: GET /api/dashboard/market-radar works (regression test)
FRONTEND: Landing page loads correctly with CSP enforcement
FRONTEND: Pricing page loads correctly with 3 plan cards (Starter £19, Pro £39, Elite £79)
FRONTEND: Dashboard loads correctly after login
FRONTEND: ProductDecisionPanel renders with data-testid='product-decision-panel'
FRONTEND: 'What Should I Do Next?' header visible
FRONTEND: Decision steps found (save-first-product, start-watchlist) with correct data-testids
FRONTEND: Action buttons visible, enabled, and clickable
FRONTEND: 'Discover Products' button navigates to /discover page
FRONTEND: QuickLaunchFlow panel renders correctly
FRONTEND: BeginnerPanel renders correctly
FRONTEND: TrendScout Radar panel renders correctly
FRONTEND: WhileYouWereAway panel renders correctly
FRONTEND: Your Stores panel renders correctly

verified_features.verification: FEATURE_CSP_ENFORCE=true in .env causes header to be 'Content-Security-Policy' instead of 'Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only'
GET /api/dashboard/next-steps returns personalized steps with priorities, actions, and stats
Component renders with data-testid='product-decision-panel', shows action steps with clickable buttons
ProductDecisionPanel imported and rendered after BeginnerPanel

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both CSP enforcement and Product Decision Panel features fully verified. CSP is enforced via FEATURE_CSP_ENFORCE=true in backend/.env. The next-steps endpoint returns different recommendations based on user state - admin has 2 steps (save-first-product, start-watchlist) since they have no saved products or stores. Mixed content notification error is a pre-existing issue unrelated to these changes.
